title: China launches ballistic missile from nuclear submarine in the Pacific Ocean
summary: The Chinese government conducted an SLBM missile test in international waters, confirming it did not cross Japanese airspace.

title: FIFA postpones suspension of American player Balogun after President Trump's intervention
summary: The red card sanction in the World Cup was suspended for a year, generating criticism among sports federations.

title: Former Japanese Senator Ono appeals conviction in undeclared political funds case
summary: Both the defense and the prosecution filed appeals against the 600,000 yen sentence imposed on the former LDP parliamentarian.

title: Japanese probe Hayabusa 2 successfully completes flyby of asteroid Torifune
summary: JAXA released the images obtained during the rapid approach to the celestial body, highlighting the precision of the maneuver.

title: Powerful Typhoon 9 threatens Japan's Sakishima Islands with destructive winds and heavy rain
summary: The cyclone is expected to directly impact the region between September 10 and 11, while Kyushu still suffers from remnants of intense rainfall.

title: Suspect flees police by swimming across river in Aichi Prefecture
summary: The man, wanted by authorities, managed to escape by swimming and later boarded a vehicle in Osaka city.

title: High school student arrested for hacking Bandai Channel streaming platform
summary: The teenager caused the forced deactivation of more than 46,000 user accounts during the cyberattack on the company.

title: Man arrested for vandalism at a Hamazushi chain restaurant
summary: The 43-year-old suspect was arrested after an altercation, although he had previously been penalized for similar behavior.

title: Japan commemorates eighth anniversary of deadly western Japan floods
summary: Affected communities remembered the more than 300 victims of the 2018 natural disaster in various commemorative events.

title: Worker dies after falling into Lake Biwa during installation for Birdman Contest
summary: The workplace accident occurred while setting up the landing platform for the popular human flight competition.

title: KDDI reports massive leak of personal data of millions of customers
summary: The leak exposed email addresses and passwords, affecting more than 12 million user accounts.

title: Mos Burger announces widespread price increase starting September 15
summary: The hamburger chain will increase the price of its flagship product to 500 yen, affecting 80% of its menu.

title: Price of new harvest rice in Japan falls 20% due to oversupply
summary: Producers face a price drop due to increased inventories stored from the previous year.

title: Osaka Expo 2025 mascot Myaku-Myaku installed in famous Dotonbori district
summary: The giant statue of the character was strategically placed to promote the international event among tourists.

title: Prime Minister Takaichi faces tough questioning in Diet budget committee
summary: The debate focused on the government's security policies and its controversial management of parliamentary sessions.

title: Japanese 10-year bond yield reaches highest level in 30 years
summary: Long-term interest rates exceeded 2.82%, reflecting market expectations on monetary policy.

title: Norway eliminates Brazil and advances to World Cup quarterfinals, England also qualifies
summary: Erling Haaland scored two goals to seal Norway's passage, while England defeated Mexico to join the next round.

title: JAXA resumes Epsilon S rocket engine tests after H3 launch failure
summary: The Japanese space agency implements new expert reviews to avoid future failures in its space missions.

title: Bear sightings increase in urban and rural areas of Japan
summary: Authorities warn about the presence of bears in Hokkaido cities and mountain trails following several recent incidents.

title: Analysts warn about growing Chinese influence and global geopolitical risks
summary: Experts warn about Beijing's influence operations, tension in Taiwan, and the need to increase defense spending.
